transform.script: ArrayList recs = new ArrayList(); for (h in ctx.payload.hits.hits) { def e = h._source; def s = h.inner_hits.start.hits.hits[0]._source; Map r = [ '@timestamp': s.get('@timestamp'), 'realm' : e.realm, 'class': e.class, 'name' : s.service_name, 'id': s.service_id, 'start_time': s.get('@timestamp'), 'end_time': e.get('@timestamp'), 'start_millis': s.start_millis, 'end_millis' : e.start_millis, 'duration': e.start_millis - s.start_millis, 'end_event_id': e.event_uid, 'start_event_uid' : s.event_uid, 'trace_parent_id': s.trace_parent_id,'trace_uid': s.trace_uid]; recs.add(r); } return ['_doc': recs];
ArrayList recs = new ArrayList(); for (h in ctx.payload.hits.hits) {def e = h._source; e.put('matched', true); e._routing = e.start_end.parent; e._id = h._id; recs.add(e)} return ['_doc': recs];

ArrayList recs = new ArrayList(); for (h in ctx.payload.hits.hits) {def sh = h.inner_hits.start.hits.hits[0]; def s = sh._source; s._id = sh._id; s.matched = true; recs.add(s); } return ['_doc': recs];
